title: Carbon Quantum Dots for Zebrafish Fluorescence Imaging.
author: Kang YF Li YH Fang YW Xu Y Wei XM Yin XB
content: S-EPMC4488761 PMC4488761 Carbon Quantum Dots for Zebrafish Fluorescence Imaging. Carbon quantum dots (C-QDs) are becoming a desirable alternative to metal-based QDs and dye probes owing to their high biocompatibility, low toxicity, ease of preparation, and unique photophysical properties.
